items.title: The Steam Controller’s reservation queue is open
items.summary: After quickly selling out of the Steam Controller on May 4th, Valve has launched a reservation system to ensure that you can get one without too much hassle. You may not get one...
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: US defense contractor who sold hacking tools to Russian broker ordered to pay $10M to former employers
items.summary: Former cybersecurity executive Peter Williams stole several surveillance and hacking tools and sold them for $1.3 million to a Russian broker that works with Putin’s government.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Legendary Nintendo designer Takashi Tezuka is seemingly retiring from the company
items.summary: Tezuka helped create the very first Mario and Zelda games.
